name: bootstrap eval: baseline precision/recall hashes pinned in lock.json so subsequent runs can detect regression
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/lock.sh" --init && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/init-guardrails.sh" --run-bootstrap-evals --pin-to-lock && grep -E "bootstrap_eval_baseline_hash" .claude-tdd-pro/lock.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
